# Road Ready Insurance Agency

> Specialist commercial trucking insurance broker based in Boca Raton, Florida.
> Licensed in 48 states plus the District of Columbia. Access to 120+ carriers
> including premium A-rated markets most small brokers cannot place, with an
> in-house licensed claims adjuster and named agents who answer the phone.

Built for established fleet owners running 2 to 9 units (up to 50), 2 or more
years in business, growing steadily at 1 to 2 units per year. Not built for
the fast-quote, 5-minute-turnaround market.

## Key information

- Website: https://www.roadreadyinsurance.com
- Headquarters: Boca Raton, Florida
- States served: 48 US states plus DC
- Carrier network: 120+ carriers including premium A-rated markets
- Claims: In-house licensed claims adjuster on staff
- Hours: Monday through Friday, 9am-6pm ET

## What Road Ready Insurance places

- Commercial Trucking Liability
- Physical Damage (Comprehensive and Collision)
- Motor Truck Cargo
- Trailer Interchange
- Non-Trucking Liability (Bobtail)
- Reefer Breakdown
- Truckers Workers Compensation
- Transportation Bonds (BMC-84, ICC)
- Single Trip Cargo
- Construction Equipment (Inland Marine)
- Additional Coverages (GAP, rental reimbursement, tow and labor)

## Ideal client profile

- Fleet size: 2-9 units (sweet spot), up to 50 units
- Time in business: 2 or more years
- Growth pattern: steady, adding 1-2 units per year
- Decision-maker: owner-operator or owner/fleet manager
- Authority-held operations, not leased-on drivers
- Values carrier quality and responsive service over quote speed

## How quote timelines actually work

- Secondary market quotes: 24-48 hours
- Premium A-rated carrier placement: 1-2 weeks
- The extra time is how Road Ready Insurance accesses better carriers. The
  fast-quote model does not reach premium markets.

## State-specific resources

- [Florida](https://www.roadreadyinsurance.com/states/florida/)

## Differentiators

- Carrier quality over carrier count. Access to premium A-rated markets that
  most small brokers cannot represent, not just the secondary markets every
  broker can quote from.
- Licensed claims adjuster on staff. Claims handled directly by a trucking
  specialist, not routed to a third-party call center.
- Named agents. Every client has a named agent who picks up the phone,
  remembers the fleet, and proactively reaches out at renewal.
- Built for the operator who wants the coverage correct the first time. Not
  the fastest quote, the right one.
